Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.algorithm.AbstractAlgorithm

Packages that use AbstractAlgorithm
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.

  • Uses of AbstractAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm

    Subclasses of AbstractAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Abstract class providing default implementations for several EvolutionaryAlgorithm methods.
    class 
    AGEMOEAII
    Implementation of AGE-MOEA-II, which is an adaptive evolutionary algorithm that estimates the Pareto front geometry and uses this to score solutions during selection.
    class 
    CMAES
    The Covariance Matrix Adaption Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES) algorithm for single and multi-objective problems.
    class 
    DBEA
    Implementation of the Improved Decomposition-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (I-DBEA).
    class 
    EpsilonMOEA
    Implementation of the ε-MOEA algorithm.
    class 
    EpsilonNSGAII
    Implements the ε-NSGA-II algorithm.
    class 
    GDE3
    Implementation of the Generalized Differential Evolution (GDE3) algorithm.
    class 
    IBEA
    Implementation of the Indicator-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (IBEA).
    class 
    MOEAD
    Implementation of MOEA/D, the multiobjective evolutionary algorithm with decomposition.
    class 
    MSOPS
    Implementation of the Multiple Single Objective Pareto Sampling (MSOPS) algorithm.
    class 
    NSGAII
    Implementation of NSGA-II, with the ability to attach an optional ε-dominance archive.
    class 
    NSGAIII
    Implementation of NSGA-III.
    class 
    PAES
    Implementation of the (1+1) Pareto Archived Evolution Strategy (PAES).
    class 
    PESA2
    Implementation of the Pareto Envelope-based Selection Algorithm (PESA2).
    class 
    RandomSearch
    Random search implementation.
    class 
    RVEA
    Implementation of the Reference Vector Guided Evolutionary Algorithm (RVEA).
    class 
    SMSEMOA
    Implementation of the S-metric Selection MOEA (SMS-MOEA).
    class 
    SPEA2
    Implementation of the strength-based evolutionary algorithm (SPEA2).
    class 
    UNSGAIII
    Implementation of the "unified" NSGA-III, or U-NSGA-III, which improves selection pressure by replacing the random selection of NSGA-III with tournament selection.
    class 
    VEGA
    Implementation of the Vector Evaluated Genetic Algorithm (VEGA).

  • Uses of AbstractAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso

    Subclasses of AbstractAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractPSOAlgorithm
    Abstract multi-objective particle swarm optimizer (MOPSO).
    class 
    OMOPSO
    Implementation of OMOPSO, a multi-objective particle swarm optimizer (MOPSO).
    class 
    SMPSO
    Implementation of SMPSO, the speed-constrained multi-objective particle swarm optimizer.

  • Uses of AbstractAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa

    Subclasses of AbstractAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractSimulatedAnnealingAlgorithm
    Abstract class of fundamental simulated annealing algorithm.
    class 
    AMOSA
    Implementation of the simulated annealing-based multiobjective optimization algorithm (AMOSA).

  • Uses of AbstractAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single

    Subclasses of AbstractAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DifferentialEvolution
    Single-objective differential evolution (DE) algorithm.
    class 
    EvolutionStrategy
    Single-objective (mu + lambda) evolution strategy (ES) algorithm.
    class 
    GeneticAlgorithm
    Single-objective genetic algorithm (GA) implementation with elitism.
    class 
    RepeatedSingleObjective
    Instantiates and runs several instances of a single objective algorithm.
    class 
    SimulatedAnnealing
    Implementation of single-objective simulated annealing.
    class 
    SingleObjectiveEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Abstract class for building single-objective evolutionary algorithms.
